      限定符和类型 类和说明
      class  Hessian2Input
      Input stream for Hessian requests.
      class  HessianInput
      Input stream for Hessian requests.
      class  HessianSerializerInput
      Input stream for Hessian requests, deserializing objects using the java.io.Serialization protocol.
